title: swertia nervosa
intro: Swertia nervosa, also known as Himalayan Swertia or Nervosan, is a perennial plant belonging to the gentian family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antidiabetic agent. Swertia nervosa is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further research.
